name: Dogmatika Adin, the Enlightened
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>教導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラグマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>啓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アディン
desc: Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dogmatika Adin, the Enlightened" once per turn. If a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Dogmatika" monster from your Deck, except "Dogmatika Adin, the Enlightened".
mnst_eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dogmatika Adin, the Enlightened" once per turn. If a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Dogmatika" monster from your Deck, except "Dogmatika Adin, the Enlightened".
eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dogmatika Adin, the Enlightened" once per turn. If a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Dogmatika" monster from your Deck, except "Dogmatika Adin, the Enlightened".

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
